failure_reason: Superseded the Python speech-runner path with checked-in Form-native speech/model/kernel/oracle learning surfaces. speech-model-learning now proves local LLM oracle receipts, high-dimensional metadata, and optional human feedback routing at 16383 four-way. speech-kernel-channel proves explicit audio frame and local LLM oracle host-kernel carriers at 511 four-way. speech-real-candidate-race keeps observed local audio-derived rows as Form data and returns 4095 on Go/Rust/TypeScript. code-tool-learning adds a Form-native code generation/tool-use sideband with A/B candidates, token-cost receipts, metadata gates, compiler/source-grounding oracle requests, the low-token floor-oracle winner, and the natural-language to Form/BML/domain-grammar to Form-binary to host-native-ASM lowering path at 131071 four-way. oracle-catalog names fifteen third-party evidence lanes and returns 16383 four-way. Remaining Python use in this record is repo evidence validation only, not a speech/model carrier.
